content_reviews.summary_review_note: v0.8.9 deep verification (20 May 2026). Primary EUR-Lex CELEX URL (32024R1689): automated curl HTTP 202 (bot protection / JS challenge); instrument full text not read. Secondary official EU source checked: European Commission digital-strategy AI Act page HTTP 200; visible title "AI Act | Shaping Europe's digital future"; page links CELEX 32024R1689 and states Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 is the comprehensive AI legal framework — corroborates record title and CELEX mapping at high level only. Commission page "Last update" visible: 11 May 2026. No legal interpretation; no copying of legal text.
content_reviews.date_review_note: Sample key_dates in record remain unverified on EUR-Lex full text (WAF limitation). Commission page mentions phased applicability dates (e.g. 1 Aug 2024 entry into force context) — curator should align key_dates with EUR-Lex/OJ in a human browser pass.
content_reviews.status_review_note: Record legal_status in_force — consistent with published EU regulation at high level; not re-verified on EUR-Lex consolidated text in this session.
